scraped.title: Baked Shrimp with Lemon Garlic Butter Sauce
scraped.description: These baked shrimps are gorgeous and super quick to prepare! Just pop the shrimps in the oven and dinner is ready.

ingredients.name: Sriracha sauce (or any hot sauce you like)
fresh lemon juice + slices of lemon for garnish

steps: To make the baked shrimp: Preheat your oven to 350ºF (180ºC). Arrange shrimp in a baking dish.
In a small bowl, combine broth, sriracha and lemon juice.
Pour the mixture over shrimp in the baking dish, season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes. Top shrimp with minced garlic and speck with the diced butter.
